name: lookup_faculty_topic
description: List faculty members whose research interests mention a given topic or area.

name: lookup_center
description: Query research centers - either find centers a faculty member leads, or find who leads a center. Provide either a faculty name OR a center name.

faculty.description: Faculty name to find their centers (e.g., 'Kristian Hammond').

center.description: Center name to find its leadership (e.g., 'Center for Deep Learning').

use_last_subject.description: If true, reuse the last referenced person/center from conversation.

name: lookup_advisorship
description: Query advisor relationships. For a student: returns their faculty advisors. For faculty: returns their advisees (students they advise).

name.description: Name of student or faculty member (e.g., 'Khalil Anderson' or 'Marcelo Worsley').

use_last_subject.description: If true, reuse the last referenced person from conversation.

name: lookup_staff_support
description: Recommend the staff contact responsible for a student-facing need (e.g., academic advising, reimbursements, travel, events).

topic.description: Administrative need or keyword (e.g., 'reimbursements', 'travel', 'student group events').

name: lookup_office_hours
description: Retrieve office hours: (1) by course - all slots for a class (e.g., 'CS 336'); (2) by course + day - slots for a class on a specific day (e.g., 'CS 336 on Wednesday'); (3) by person - all slots for a faculty/TA (e.g., 'Prof Hammond'). Provide course OR person; day is optional.

person.description: Person name for their office hours (faculty or TA, e.g., 'Anjali', 'Mia George', 'Prof Hammond').

day.description: Optional day filter for course or person (e.g., 'Monday', 'Friday', 'W', 'today', 'tomorrow').

use_last_subject.description: If true, reuse the previously referenced class or person from conversation context.

name: lookup_person
description: Search faculty, staff, and students for a person and return merged profile facts. Returns a `person_type` metadata field indicating the detected role (primary and all matches).

use_last_subject.description: Reuse last referenced person if true.

name: lookup_location
description: Find the location for a person (faculty office, staff office, or student seating). Works for faculty, staff, and students.

name.description: Full name of the person (faculty, staff, or student).

use_last_subject.description: If true, reuse the last person mentioned in the conversation.

name: list_events
description: List upcoming Northwestern CS events, optionally filtered by keyword.
